name: Expert Credit Pro
description_short: Miami-based credit management firm offering personal and business credit repair services by appointment. Operates Monday-Friday with online booking via Square.
description_long:
Expert Credit Pro is a credit management service located in Miami, Florida, operating from a professional office address at 1900 North Bayshore Drive. The company positions itself as a provider of both personal and business credit management solutions, suggesting a dual-focus approach to credit repair and optimization. Founded as a service-based business accepting appointments through an online Square booking system, the company appears to target consumers and business owners seeking professional assistance with credit issues.

The company offers personal and business credit management services, though specific service details are limited on their public-facing website. Based on their categorization and service description, they likely provide credit dispute assistance, credit report analysis, and credit optimization strategies. They accept appointments during standard business hours (10 AM - 5 PM, Monday-Friday) and provide multiple contact methods including phone, email, and online booking. The business model emphasizes one-on-one consultation and service delivery.

Expert Credit Pro distinguishes itself by offering separate service tracks for both personal and business credit management, rather than focusing exclusively on consumer credit repair. This dual offering suggests specialized knowledge in business credit profiles, trade lines, and commercial credit building—services many traditional credit repair companies do not provide. Their Miami location also positions them to serve the South Florida market with local expertise.

A significant limitation is the minimal transparency on their website regarding specific services, pricing, methodology, or credentials. The website lacks detailed information about what disputes they handle, success rates, turnaround times, or professional certifications. Prospective clients must contact the company directly to understand what they offer, making it difficult to assess their legitimacy or differentiate them from competitors without direct engagement. No testimonials, case studies, or detailed service descriptions are publicly available.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers both personal and business credit management—uncommon dual focus in credit repair market
Professional office location in Miami with established physical address
Multiple contact methods: phone, email, and online booking system
Convenient operating hours (10 AM - 5 PM, Monday-Friday) for working professionals
Uses Square for secure online appointment booking and checkout
Accessible by appointment, suggesting personalized consultation approach
cons: Website lacks specific details about services offered, pricing, or methodology
No information about credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance (FCRA, CRA licensing)
No testimonials, case studies, success rates, or client reviews publicly available
Minimal transparency about dispute process, timeline, or expected outcomes
Business credit services unproven—no track record or case examples shown
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking in-person credit repair consultation
Small business owners needing help building or repairing business credit profiles
Consumers preferring local, appointment-based credit services over online-only providers
diagnosis: Expert Credit Pro is best for Miami-area consumers and small business owners seeking local, personalized credit management with appointment-based service. The major caveat is the severe lack of public transparency—potential clients should request detailed information about credentials, specific services, pricing, and dispute methodology before committing, as the website provides insufficient information to verify legitimacy or assess service quality.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1900 N Bayshore Dr STE 1A, Miami, FL 33132
